exploration_notes: Identified 13 core source files spanning Raft consensus integration, lease management, and liveness-based health checking. The Raft ready pipeline flows: raftScheduler (scheduler.go) enqueues work -> Store.processReady (store_raft.go) dispatches to replicas -> Replica.handleRaftReady/handleRaftReadyRaftMuLocked (replica_raft.go) processes the raft Ready struct -> replicaStateMachine.ApplySideEffects (replica_application_state_machine.go) applies committed entries. Lease management centers on rep
